summary.en: Lithium cells, modules, and battery packs shipped to Tunisia normally need dangerous-goods transport evidence under the UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, subsection 38.3, plus the applicable modal rules for sea, air, road, or multimodal transport. UN 38.3 is transport evidence, not an installation approval or Tunisia product certification.
summary.zh: 运往突尼斯的锂电芯、模组和电池包通常需要符合《联合国试验和标准手册》第38.3小节的危险货物运输证据，并满足海运、空运、公路或多式联运的适用规则。UN 38.3是运输证据，不是安装批准或突尼斯产品认证。
summary.zht: 運往突尼西亞的鋰電芯、模組和電池包通常需要符合《聯合國試驗和標準手冊》第38.3小節的危險貨物運輸證據，並滿足海運、空運、公路或多式聯運的適用規則。UN 38.3是運輸證據，不是安裝批准或突尼西亞產品認證。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, subsection 38.3
UN Model Regulations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods
IMDG Code / ICAO Technical Instructions / IATA DGR where applicable

summary.en: China exporters commonly hold UN 38.3 test summaries, MSDS / SDS, dangerous-goods classification reports, and packaging certificates. These documents are directly useful for Tunisia shipments if they identify the same cells, modules, packs, configuration, state of charge, and packaging used in the consignment.
summary.zh: 中国出口商通常持有UN 38.3测试概要、MSDS/SDS、危险货物分类报告和包装证书。若这些文件对应同一货批所用的电芯、模组、电池包、配置、荷电状态和包装，它们对突尼斯运输具有直接价值。
summary.zht: 中國出口商通常持有UN 38.3測試概要、MSDS／SDS、危險貨物分類報告和包裝證書。若這些文件對應同一貨批所用的電芯、模組、電池包、配置、荷電狀態和包裝，它們對突尼西亞運輸具有直接價值。

standards_or_laws: China export packaging certificate where applicable

gap.en: Check that UN 38.3 reports cover the exact battery design and that the test summary, SDS, emergency contact, labels, marks, overpack information, and shipping declaration match the selected transport mode and Tunisia consignee documentation.
gap.zh: 应确认UN 38.3报告覆盖准确的电池设计，并确保测试概要、SDS、应急联系人、标签、标记、集合包装信息和运输申报与所选运输方式及突尼斯收货人文件一致。
gap.zht: 應確認UN 38.3報告覆蓋準確的電池設計，並確保測試概要、SDS、應急聯絡人、標籤、標記、集合包裝資訊和運輸申報與所選運輸方式及突尼西亞收貨人文件一致。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for lithium battery dangerous-goods transport where UN 38.3 and modal transport rules apply; not a substitute for Tunisia installation, grid, or fire approval
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for covered lithium battery export transport under dangerous-goods transport rules

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 is a shipment gate for lithium batteries, but it does not close Tunisia grid, fire, or project-approval gaps.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3是锂电池运输关口，但不能覆盖突尼斯并网、消防或项目批准差距。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3是鋰電池運輸關口，但不能覆蓋突尼西亞併網、消防或項目批准差距。
